verdict: Gold Bond's bumpy-skin formula smartly uses urea and lactic acid for gentle chemical exfoliation paired with glycerin hydration, addressing keratosis pilaris and texture issues with proven actives. Excellent targeted efficacy.

_research.name: Gold Bond Rough and Bumpy Skin Relief
pros: Urea + lactic acid targets bumpy texture
_research.con: Lactic acid may irritate very sensitive skin; requires patch testing for reactive individuals.
